subcodes.first_line: O servant of 'Alí and servant of Bahá! Whosoever serveth 'Alí—that is, the exalted One, may my spirit be a sacrifice unto Him—as He truly is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبد علی و عبد بهاء هرکس بعبودیت علی یعنی حضرت اعلی روحی له الفداء کما هی
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @high station of the true believer, @twin Manifestations, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
